diagrams.title: Storyboard Frame Layout Template
diagrams.description: Standard layout showing how to structure each frame in a storyboard
diagrams.purpose: Learn proper storyboard frame structure for consistent documentation

diagrams.title: User Flow Diagram - E-commerce Checkout
diagrams.description: Horizontal flow showing 5 steps from cart to order confirmation
elements: Frame 1: Cart Review → Arrow → Frame 2: Shipping Info → Arrow → Frame 3: Payment → Arrow → Frame 4: Review → Arrow → Frame 5: Confirmation
Main path shown with solid arrows
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how user flows connect across multiple storyboard frames

diagrams.title: Low-fidelity vs High-fidelity Storyboard Comparison
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison showing same scene at different fidelity levels
elements: Left: Rough pencil sketch with simple shapes, handwritten text
Right: Digital design with colors, proper typography, detailed icons
Same user flow and information in both
diagrams.purpose: Understand the difference between fidelity levels and when to use each

diagrams.title: UX Storyboard with Emotional Indicators
diagrams.description: Storyboard panel showing emotional state tracking across user journey
elements: Each frame has emotional icon above it
diagrams.purpose: Learn to track and visualize user emotions throughout the journey
